prompt: What are the 5 most frequent words (case sensitive) used in movie titles in the 1980s and 1990s combined? Sorted first by frequency count then alphabetically. output fields count and word

assertions.name: uses_aggregation
assertions.description: Uses aggregation pipeline (required for this complexity)

assertions.name: splits_title
assertions.description: Uses $split or similar to break title into words

assertions.name: sorts_correctly
assertions.description: Sorts by count descending, then word alphabetically
